message:
fix(extensions): resolve remaining O(N^2) string concatenations in polyfills

Continuing the previous optimization, this replaces the remaining character-by-character `+= String.fromCharCode(...)` loops in the JS shims with chunked `String.fromCharCode.apply(...)`.
Fixed functions:
- `base64Encode` in buffer_shim.rs
- `latin1Decode` in buffer_shim.rs
- The base64 text encoding branch in extensions_js.rs

Also removes an unnecessary `.to_vec()` allocation inside `session_store_v2.rs` during index rebuilding for improved performance.
